name: Mom's Pineapple Nut Loaf
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Pineapple, undrained (chunks or crushed may be used) (1 can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a mixing bowl.
2. Add raisins and nuts to the dry ingredients.
3. In a separate bowl, combine egg, vanilla extract, and melted butter.
4. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until well combined.
5. Dissolve baking soda in pineapple with juice.
6. Mix the dissolved baking soda and pineapple juice into the batter thoroughly.
7. Grease and lightly flour a large loaf pan.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, or until done.
10. Remove from the baking pan and cool on a rack.
